description: Lark is an all-in-one collaboration platform that combines messaging, video conferencing, document editing, calendar, and workflow automation into a single SaaS application.
authentication: Supports OAuth 2.0, SAML 2.0, and LDAP for single sign-on; also offers API key authentication for developer access.
self_serve: Users can sign up for a free tier and upgrade to paid plans directly through the web interface; administrators can manage teams, roles, and billing via the admin console.
api_surface: Provides RESTful APIs for messaging, file storage, calendar, and workflow; offers Webhooks for event notifications; SDKs available for JavaScript, Python, and Java.
mcp: No known major security or compliance certifications publicly listed; Lark claims GDPR compliance and SOC 2 Type II audit, but detailed reports are not publicly available.
buildability: Offers a developer portal with API documentation, SDKs, and sample code; supports custom integrations via webhooks and API calls; no public plugin marketplace yet.
main_blocker: Limited public documentation on API rate limits and detailed authentication flows; lack of publicly available compliance reports may hinder enterprise adoption.
